category_sources: source_facts.description says Hadoop is a framework for distributed processing of large data sets; official Apache Hadoop homepage describes reliable, scalable distributed computing and large data set processing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the Apache Hadoop site; official homepage names the project Apache Hadoop.
docs_sources: Official Apache Hadoop homepage links to current, latest, stable, and versioned documentation; /docs/current/ is the official current docs surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Hadoop Version Control page says the source code resides in the Apache git repository at gitbox.apache.org and notes GitHub is a mirror.
tags_sources: Official Apache Hadoop homepage lists HDFS, YARN, and MapReduce modules and describes distributed processing of large data sets.
